tldr: OpenAI dominated with IMO gold medal, GPT-5 confirmation, and ChatGPT Agent launch. Alibaba dropped a massive open-source wave: Qwen3-235B-Thinking (SOTA reasoning), Qwen3-Coder-480B (open agentic coding), Qwen-MT (92 languages), plus Qwen3.8 (2.4T params) announced. Anthropic rolled out Claude for Financial Services, Canva integration, Claude-powered Artifacts beta, and rate limit changes coming Aug 28. CRITICAL: DeepSeek's deepseek-chat/reasoner aliases retire July 24 — all integrations must migrate to v4. Zo Computer published deep methodology essays on AI coding workflows.

articles.title: OpenAI achieves gold medal at 2025 IMO with reasoning LLM — 5/6 problems solved
articles.summary: General-purpose reasoning LLM scores 35/42 at International Mathematical Olympiad — gold medal level.

articles.title: GPT-5 confirmed: OpenAI says it's releasing 'soon'
articles.summary: OpenAI confirms GPT-5 release imminent — separate from IMO experimental model which won't ship for months.

articles.title: ChatGPT Agent launched — browser, terminal, API, autonomous task execution
articles.summary: ChatGPT now thinks and acts proactively using a virtual computer — rolling to Pro, Plus, and Team.

articles.title: Anthropic: new Claude Pro/Max weekly rate limits from Aug 28
articles.summary: Claude Code's extreme usage drives new caps. Max users can buy extra at standard API rates.

articles.title: Anthropic launches Claude for Financial Services
articles.summary: Claude integrates with leading data platforms and industry providers for financial workflows.

articles.title: Claude + Canva: turn documents into branded designs
articles.summary: Upload blog posts, product guides, or meeting notes — Claude turns them into professional visuals.

articles.title: Claude-powered Artifacts beta — AI apps via API
articles.summary: Artifacts now interact with Claude through an API, turning them into AI-powered apps. Free/Pro/Max beta.

articles.title: Anthropic publishes 'Build AI in America' report
articles.summary: Outlines energy and infrastructure needed to maintain US AI leadership.

articles.title: New Anthropic Research: Inverse Scaling in Test-Time Compute
articles.summary: Cases where longer reasoning leads to lower accuracy — challenging assumptions about compute scaling.

articles.title: Anthropic hiring agent devs to discover advanced LLM behaviors
articles.summary: Building autonomous agents that discover and analyze advanced behaviors in language models.

articles.title: Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507 released — SOTA open-source thinking model
articles.summary: Expanded thinking length, SOTA among open-source reasoning models. Abandons hybrid thinking approach.

articles.title: Qwen3-Coder-480B-A35B — most powerful open agentic code model
articles.summary: 480B MoE (35B active), 256K native context scaling to 1M. Open-sourcing Qwen Code CLI tool.

articles.title: Qwen-MT: machine translation for 92 languages covering 95%+ of global population
articles.summary: Built on Qwen3 foundation. Apache 2.0 open-source.

articles.title: Qwen3.8 announced: 2.4T parameters, going open-weight soon
articles.summary: Preview on Alibaba's Token Plan. Positioned as comparable to leading frontier models, second only to Fable 5.

articles.title: CRITICAL: DeepSeek legacy aliases retire July 24 — migrate now
articles.summary: deepseek-chat/reasoner aliases retire Jul 24. Route to deepseek-v4-flash (thinking/non-thinking) instead.

articles.title: DeepSeek V4 permanent API discounts — input cache 1/10th original price
articles.summary: V4-Pro cache pricing made permanent. Pricing drops across entire API series.

articles.title: ChatGPT Agent built a complete retirement plan autonomously
articles.summary: Rowan Cheung: ChatGPT Agent analyzed tax laws, FIRE scenarios, investments unassisted — $5k advisor value.

articles.title: Perplexity Comet review: 'First agent that's actually sticking with me'
articles.summary: Email/calendar management, feed scrolling. Available to Perplexity Max ($200/mo) or by invitation.

articles.title: Zo Computer: Substrate, Agents, Workflow — AI coding methodology essay
articles.summary: Planning vs doing agent split: o3 for depth, Claude Code/Cursor for implementation. Style as differentiator.

articles.title: Zo Computer vision: the future is an intelligent personal server
articles.summary: Less fragmented files and tools. More custody over your AI — personal server model for computing.

articles.title: Kimi K3 forcing Western AI labs to question compute advantage — analysis
articles.summary: Moonshot's 300-person team matches Opus 4.8. OpenAI strategist calls K3 'very good' but warns of 'AI communism.'

articles.title: Meta reportedly in talks to sell excess AI compute to Anthropic
articles.summary: Zuckerberg's plan to monetize Meta's data centers finds first big customer in Anthropic.
